docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $399.00 FILED BY VALENCIA, THERESA AS TO DEFENDANT RUSTION, JULIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-18-2009 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-18-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-20-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT JULIO RUSTION IS ORDERED TO PAY $50.00 PER MONTH BEGINNING ON JANUARY 15, 2010, AND CONTINUING EVERY MONTH UNTIL THE DEBT IN THE AMOUNT OF $395.00 (PRINCIPLE OF $340.00 AND COURT COSTS OF $55.00) IS PAID. JUDGE: MONICA F. WILEY.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2010 - CONTINUED PER ORDER OF APRIL 20, 2010 FOR FINAL PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-19-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. NO APPEARANCES. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-20-2010 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO OCT-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCES, CONTINUE 6 MONTHS FOR FURTHER PROGRESS REPORT. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ONLY. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $25.00) SERVED DEC-07-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RUSTION, JULIO
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-18-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-18-2009 BY MONICA F. WILEY. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
NO APPEARANCES. DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. JUDGE: DONALD MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
